recommendations.title: Colonia
recommendations.overview: A young woman's desperate search for her abducted boyfriend draws her into the infamous Colonia Dignidad, a sect nobody ever escaped from.

recommendations.title: Gabbar Is Back
recommendations.overview: A vigilante network taking out corrupt officials draws the notice of the authorities.

recommendations.title: Mary Queen of Scots

recommendations.title: De Gaulle
recommendations.overview: Paris, June 1940. The de Gaulle couple is confronted with the military and political collapse of France. Charles de Gaulle joins London while Yvonne, his wife, finds herself with her three children on the road of the exodus.

recommendations.title: Backstabbing for Beginners
recommendations.overview: An idealistic young employee at the U.N. investigates the grisly murder of his predecessor – and uncovers a vast global conspiracy that may involve his own boss.

recommendations.title: Herself

recommendations.title: The Night of the Hunter
recommendations.overview: In Depression-era West Virginia, a serial-killing preacher hunts two young children who know the whereabouts of a stash of money.

recommendations.title: Henry V
recommendations.overview: In 1415, in the midst of the Hundred Years' War, the young King Henry V of England embarks on the conquest of France.

recommendations.title: Live!
recommendations.overview: A mockumentary following an ambitious TV network executive trying to produce a controversial reality show where contestants play Russian Roulette.
